chapter_title.en: Expressing his displeasure to Kumayl, the governor of Heet, who was unable to prevent enemy raids

text: ومن كتاب له (عليه السلام) إلى كميل بن زياد النخعي وهو عامله على هيت ينكر عليه تركه دفع من يجتاز به من جيش العدو طالبا الغارة

en.sayed-ali-raza: To Kumayl ibn Ziyād an-Nakha‘ī, the Governor of Hit expressing displeasure on his inability to prevent the the enemy forces that passed through his area from marauding.
